verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who am I that You are mindful of me That You hear me when I call Is it true that You are thinking of me How You love me it's amazing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am a friend of God, I am a friend of God, I am a friend of God, He calls me friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God Almighty, Lord of Glory You have called me friend

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He calls me friend He calls me friend…
